budget_vs_actual.cost_code: Job #2019 — Exxel Pacific 8th & Republican Apartments  •  GC: Exxel Pacific, Inc. (Owner: The Wolff Company)  •  Seattle, WA
Canonical source: 2019 Job Detail Report.pdf (249 pages, OWP Sage Timberline export)
Unit count (211) confirmed by two independent sources:
1) Keller Supply consolidated trim PO (8TH REP TRIM - KELLER.xlsx): 211 Delta 4159-DST kitchen faucets
2) Seattle/King County plumbing permit #1459 ($11,925 fee, 10/23/2014): Water Closet field = 211
Fixture breakdown from same permit: Lavs 255, Tubs/Showers 214, Kitchen 211, DW 211, Floor Drains 49, Urinals 2, Sump 8, Roof Drains 10, + misc = ~1,196
Billing: REPUBLICAN AGGREGATE BILLING.xlsx (20 pay apps, Sep 2014 – Jun 2016) + 20 underlying SOV files
Change orders: 10 COs net +$156,008.60 (can layout, acoustical wrap, added boilers, ASI 15/48, premium time, etc.)

insights.title: Labor came in 7.0% under budget
insights.finding: Total labor actual $550,833 vs budget $592,300 — $41,467 favorable variance.

insights.title: Scope stability — 24 executed COs net $13,253 (+0.00% of contract)
insights.finding: Minimal scope churn indicates well-defined contract and experienced GC. Candidate GC profile for future similar bids.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 230 (Finish Material) under by $174,889
insights.finding: Budget $488,611, actual $313,722 (-35.8%). Flag for bid calibration.
